name: The healing house
description:
As you enter this flet, the light blinds you somewhat.  After a few seconds,
your eyes adjust to the glow.  The walls are lined with bottles and odd-looking
packages.  Occasionally the old elf takes one of these down briefly.  As you
look around you see a wide variety of elves, almost as varied as their
ailments, who have come to seek the help of the healer.
